buyer_name: The Common Services Agency (more commonly known as NHS National Services Scotland) (NSS)
english_summary: NHS National Services Scotland is procuring a framework agreement for various types of central venous catheters and related vascular access devices. The tender covers 18 lots including coated and non-coated CVCs, PICC lines, arterial lines, dialysis catheters, implantable ports, stabilisation devices, and associated accessories for use across healthcare settings.
what_they_want: Coated Central Venous Catheters (CVC), Non-Coated Central Venous Catheters, Paediatric Central Venous Catheters, Midline Catheters, Skin Tunnelling Catheters, PICC Lines (Antimicrobial), PICC Lines (Non-Coated), Seldinger Arterial Lines, Non-Seldinger Arterial Cannulas, IV Flush Saline Pre-filled Syringes, Stabilisation Devices, Dialysis Central Venous Catheters, Implantable Ports, Central Venous Catheter Insertion Packs, Accessories, and Innovation products.
evaluation_criteria: Lots 1-14 are scored lots, Lot 15 (Accessories) and Lot 16 (Innovation) are unscored lots with suppliers automatically awarded if successfully awarded any scored lot (1-14), Lot 17 and Lot 18 are unscored lots requiring suppliers to meet all mandatory requirements and tender against any scored lots to be awarded.

original_title: NP16726 Multi Modality Imaging Equipment and Maintenance Framework
buyer_name: The Common Services Agency (more commonly known as Public Services Delivery Scotland) (PSD Scotland)
english_summary: This is a framework agreement for the supply, installation, maintenance, servicing and repair of multi-modality diagnostic imaging and therapy equipment across NHS Scotland facilities. It covers a comprehensive range of imaging equipment from X-ray and CT to nuclear medicine and linear accelerators, along with associated consumables and injector systems.
what_they_want: Bladder scanners; contrast and radiopharmaceutical injectors with syringes and consumables; diagnostic imaging equipment including X-Ray, Computed Radiography, CT, MR, PET/CT, Mammography, Fluoroscopy, Lithotripter, Interventional, Dental, Bone Densitometry, Image Intensifier, Nuclear Imaging, Ultrasound, Linear Accelerators; mammography vacuum devices, mammography non-wire lesion localisation detectors and devices, sentinel lymph node location detectors and non-radioactive tracer fluids; specimen cabinets; digital scoliosis imaging systems; Angiography equipment; mobile units and modular builds. Services include OEM and 3rd party maintenance, servicing, repair, supply, installation, and pre-installation turnkey works.

english_summary: NHS Greater Glasgow and Clyde is procuring one Linear Accelerator to replace end-of-life equipment at the Beatson Satellite facility at University Hospital Monklands in Airdrie, Lanarkshire. This is a radiotherapy equipment replacement project.
what_they_want: One (1) Linear Accelerator (Linac) for radiotherapy treatment

original_title: NHSDG Estates & Property ICES LOLER Inspection
english_summary: This tender is for LOLER (Lifting Operations and Lifting Equipment Regulations 1998) inspection services for community equipment located in approximately 300 private residences throughout the Dumfries and Galloway region. The inspections are part of the Integrated Community Equipment Service, a joint venture between NHS Dumfries & Galloway and Dumfries & Galloway Council that provides equipment to help people with illness or disability remain independent at home.
what_they_want: LOLER inspection services for lifting operations and lifting equipment in individual households as part of community equipment services. Services include inspections of equipment and adaptations provided to approximately 300 private residences throughout the region.

original_title: Provision of Internal and External Hand / Grab Rails
english_summary: North Ayrshire Council is seeking suppliers for the provision of internal and external hand/grab rails through an open tender process.
what_they_want: Internal and external hand rails and grab rails
